title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: A country girl is looking for a gown with bling; A socialite needs an extravagant dress for her royal Kentucky wedding and a vintage Randy dress emerges.

title: Sweet Empire: Winter Wars
subTitle: Host Wells Adams asks the six empires to channel childhood nostalgia as they create holiday showpieces inspired by vintage toys, with a requirement to incorporate movement; in a shake-up, the bottom empires are absorbed by the strongest teams.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: Kate Marker transforms a Cape Cod home in Illinois using classic designs.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: Grand Rapids, Michigan based Interior designer Jean Stoffer tells the story of her unlikely career as she takes on her biggest project to date.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned!

title: 90 Day: The Single Life
subTitle: Natalie and Josh's relationship comes to a head. Chantel meets up with Giannis at a Snail Festival and feels ignored. Veronica and Jamal fight on his last night in town. Meghan gives John an ultimatum. And Debbie meets Ruben's father.

title: Virgins
subTitle: Deanne's date backfires when she only has eyes for the waiter. A potential date gets touchy-feely with Alex at tantra speed dating. Sonali's therapist gives her homework to do in bed. Rhasha enlists her mum and sister's help swiping right.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Red already bought a just in case dress at another salon, but she doesn't want to settle. Can she find a dress that's just the one at Kleinfeld? Randy gets a blast from the past, and bride Shatava gets a taste of her own medicine!

title: Mediterranean Life
subTitle: An entrepreneur moves to Malta to take advantage of the booming market and lifestyle. He wants to be near the sea and requires space for entertaining.

title: Hawaii Life
subTitle: A recent college graduate is starting her military career and buying her first home on Oahu; she's excited to explore the different areas of the island and paddleboard in her free time; her mum comes along to help her find the perfect property.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Twins Marlo and Margo return, with Marlo as the bride. In a cruel case of karma, Margo's sass comes out and family drama further escalates upon the revelation of a major secret. Bride Val needs a gown for her icy wedding atop an Alaskan glacier.

title: Buddy vs. Duff
subTitle: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman face off with cakes depicting a bug's world. Team Duff builds towering flowers and lightning bugs while Team Buddy creates a cross-section of Earth that's full of creatures and a descending spider.

title: Battle on the Beach
subTitle: The final challenge takes the teams outside where they battle for curb appeal bragging rights. The pressure is on, and the teams go all out for their final opportunity to increase the value of their home before the grand-prize winner is crowned.

title: The Great Food Truck Race
subTitle: The four remaining food truck teams meet host Tyler Florence on the beach to create their own signature beachside snack; judges award $300 to the team with the most-delicious beach bite, and the team that sells the most treats earns $300 as well.

title: Girl Meets Farm
subTitle: Molly makes a satisfying hammy hot dish breakfast and and a cute "Mommy-and-me" lunch with her savoury tomato basil soup with parmesan and bunny pesto cristos; for dessert, Molly bakes mini princess cakes to celebrate Bernie's new tiny play kitchen.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: A country girl is looking for a gown with bling; A socialite needs an extravagant dress for her royal Kentucky wedding and a vintage Randy dress emerges.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: Kate Marker transforms a Cape Cod home in Illinois using classic designs.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: Grand Rapids, Michigan based Interior designer Jean Stoffer tells the story of her unlikely career as she takes on her biggest project to date.

title: Halloween Baking Championship
subTitle: John Henson welcomes 12 Halloween hopefuls to Hotel Henson and asks them to create faces in pie; they must impress judges Stephanie Boswell, Zac Young and Carla Hall with blood spatter cakes.

title: 100 Day Dream Home
subTitle: Two engaged police officers live in a small trailer on rural land they are trying to clear themselves; Brian and Mika take over the heavy equipment and build this couple's dream home so they can plan their wedding.

title: 100 Day Dream Home
subTitle: After building for hundreds of clients, Brian and Mika are ready for their own dream home; but they can't agree on a style.

title: Hawaii Life
subTitle: A Wyoming couple tired of long winters and cabin fever is ready for a permanent holiday on the Big Island; they love the relaxed atmosphere the island offers and want a home with scenic views that's also large enough to entertain guests.

title: Mountain Life
subTitle: Outdoor enthusiasts who frequently holiday in the mountains want to find a home in the resort town of Stowe, Vt., where they can be closer to the community they love.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned!

title: Halloween Baking Championship
subTitle: For their final night, John Henson asks the bakers to create sweet and savoury grazing boards in honour of a dearly departed couple; Carla Hall, Stephanie Boswell and Zac Young judge black wedding cakes to determine the Halloween Baking Champion.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: World traveller and nature-inspired designer Brian Patrick Flynn transforms his mid-century modern home in Atlanta, Ga, with his distinctively vibrant design style to fulfil his childhood dream of living in a treehouse.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: Kate Marker transforms a Cape Cod home in Illinois using classic designs.

title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
subTitle: 1950's mad bride Danielle wants a vintage-style dress, and hopes it will be in her budget. Later, two brides help each other find their dream dresses.

title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way
subTitle: Nicole admits to snooping. Jen begs Rishi to let her go. Gabe heads to his wedding without his sister. Kris and Jeymi have an altercation. Then, on an explosive Tell All, tempers flare, secrets are revealed and new revelations leave everyone stunned.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned!

title: Halloween Baking Championship
subTitle: For their final night, John Henson asks the bakers to create sweet and savoury grazing boards in honour of a dearly departed couple; Carla Hall, Stephanie Boswell and Zac Young judge black wedding cakes to determine the Halloween Baking Champion.

subTitle: World traveller and nature-inspired designer Brian Patrick Flynn transforms his mid-century modern home in Atlanta, Ga, with his distinctively vibrant design style to fulfil his childhood dream of living in a treehouse.

subTitle: Kate Marker transforms a Cape Cod home in Illinois using classic designs.

title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
subTitle: 1950's mad bride Danielle wants a vintage-style dress, and hopes it will be in her budget. Later, two brides help each other find their dream dresses.

title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way
subTitle: Nicole admits to snooping. Jen begs Rishi to let her go. Gabe heads to his wedding without his sister. Kris and Jeymi have an altercation. Then, on an explosive Tell All, tempers flare, secrets are revealed and new revelations leave everyone stunned.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: It's been 20 seasons of making brides' wedding dress dreams come true. Randy and the Kleinfeld team encounter more mean mums, fashion-forward fathers and scene-stealing sisters, as well as some surprising Say Yes to the Dress firsts!

title: Mediterranean Life
subTitle: A woman who has lived all over the world is ready to settle down in her parents' home country. She wants a traditional and cosy home in Dalmatia, Croatia.

title: Hawaii Life
subTitle: A family from Honolulu wants to trade in their long commutes for the pastoral life in Waimea on the Big Island; after decades of living in cramped quarters on Oahu, they are hoping to find a property with ample land and entertaining space for family.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Feisty Camila's desire to buy a black dress may push her equally fiery mother over the edge! Plus, will Ally's second custom dress arrive in time?

title: Buddy vs. Duff
subTitle: Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman take to the high seas to make pirate cakes. Team Duff creates a detailed ghost ship complete with special effects to make it ride the waves. Team Buddy builds an unlucky pirate being pursued by a smitten shark.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: Chef Robert heads to SiP Bistro in Holly Springs, NC, to try to mend the owners' relationship and negotiate a healthy balance of control. He also must do a full dining room reno and make the small kitchen as efficient as possible.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: The owner of the Dutch Treat in Franconia, NH, has lost the desire to keep his family restaurant going. His wife is more than willing to help, but no matter what she and Robert Irvine do, the Dutch Treat doesn't stand a chance without a manager.

title: 30-Minute Meals
subTitle: Chilli and curry, two of Rachael Ray's favourite ingredients, are the main spices of a quick and easy everyday dish. The spicy chicken curry with chickpeas is a highlight.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned!

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian transforms a radio executive's basement into a cool and colourful space where her two teenage children can relax; he increases the finished basement space by turning an adjacent room into an elegant home office.

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian revisits his first clients 18 years after they gave him his break in interior design to transform their kitchen and dining room into the midcentury modern spaces of their dreams; as a thank you surprise, he also transforms their living room.

title: Halloween Baking Championship
subTitle: John Henson asks the bakers to create lighting in a bottle with desserts based on classic cocktails. The bakers face their fears by frightening judges Stephanie Boswell, Zac Young and Carla Hall with entremets that represent their worst nightmares.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: Beef gets amplified with tantalising toppings at burger joints across the country, from truffled foie gras and spicy chorizo to deep-fried mac and cheese buns.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Alex Guarnaschelli attacks butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo; honey butter chicken sandwich from the aptly named restaurant Honey Butter Fried Chicken.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Succulent roast chicken from New York City; Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level with a cheesy, crunchy, gravy-drenched delight known as poutine; Duff Goldman is back in Baltimore slinging back some single-fry oysters.

title: 100 Day Dream Home
subTitle: After trying to squeeze their large, blended family into a tiny two-bedroom house, Don and Natalie finally decide to build a bigger home; Brian and Mika step in to help with the difficult design choices.

title: Hawaii Life
subTitle: Young parents with an energetic two-year-old son are trading the rainy weather in Wailuku for the sunny beaches of Kihei; they are ready to downsize to a condo with fun amenities and be as close to the beach as possible.

title: Mountain Life
subTitle: Families search for the perfect mountaintop retreat.

title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
subTitle: 1950's mad bride Danielle wants a vintage-style dress, and hopes it will be in her budget. Later, two brides help each other find their dream dresses.

title: Outrageous Pumpkins
subTitle: The final five pull out all the stops when Damaris Phillips challenges them create their own superhero and superpower. The competitors depict a scene of the one and only DC's Batman facing off against one of his iconic enemies to save Gotham City.

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian and his team blend natural elements with modern details to transform a family of four's outdated great room into a one-of-a-kind space that the whole family can enjoy.

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian teams up with an aspiring decorator and stay-at-home mother of two to transform her main bedroom from plain and simple to chic and elegant, and helps her discover her own design style in the process.

title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
subTitle: Nina wants a unique look, but is Gok's idea of a jumpsuit too much? Tracey wants a dramatic dress and is joined by her ex and his new wife.

subTitle: Nicole admits to snooping. Jen begs Rishi to let her go. Gabe heads to his wedding without his sister. Kris and Jeymi have an altercation. Then, on an explosive Tell All, tempers flare, secrets are revealed and new revelations leave everyone stunned.

subTitle: Nicole admits to snooping. Jen begs Rishi to let her go. Gabe heads to his wedding without his sister. Kris and Jeymi have an altercation. Then, on an explosive Tell All, tempers flare, secrets are revealed and new revelations leave everyone stunned.

title: Say Yes to the Dress: Asia
subTitle: Bride Khalidah wants a ball gown fit for a princess but her mother-in-law has other ideas. Daddy's girl Sarah can't seem to please her opinionated mother.

title: Say Yes to the Dress: Asia
subTitle: Brides Liyana and Shaheera must convince their traditional entourages that different can be beautiful. TV host Nina customises her own princess ball gown.

title: Mediterranean Life
subTitle: A couple fell in love with Greece on their honeymoon and are now making the move to Paros. They want a traditional Greek home with dramatic sea views.

title: Bahamas Life
subTitle: An Alabama couple looks for the perfect vacation home in the Abaco Islands region of the Bahamas. They want a relaxing place for their extended family and dog.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Shopaholic Courtney wants to look at every dress in Kleinfeld! Brianna wants a `50 Shades'-themed frock. Angela craves a tasteful gown for her circus wedding.

title: Bakery Boss
subTitle: Lidia's mother gave her the resources to open her own bakery, Buddy tries to mend the family and give Lidia the knowledge she needs to succeed.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: Chef Robert Irvine receives a desperate plea from Ayana, the daughter of the owners of So Natural Organic Restaurant and Market in Harker Heights, Texas.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: In Lincoln, NH, Robert Irvine discovers he has more than just a restaurant to repair. The White Mountain Tavern's co-owners have a volatile relationship and toxic standing in the community, giving Robert only two days to fix two massive problems.

title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
subTitle: 1950's mad bride Danielle wants a vintage-style dress, and hopes it will be in her budget. Later, two brides help each other find their dream dresses.

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian transforms three outdated spaces for a single mum and her daughters.

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian revamps a bedroom and sleeping porch for his business partner.

title: Halloween Baking Championship
subTitle: For their final night, John Henson asks the bakers to create sweet and savoury grazing boards in honour of a dearly departed couple; Carla Hall, Stephanie Boswell and Zac Young judge black wedding cakes to determine the Halloween Baking Champion.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: Highlighting the best sauce-driven dishes; from New York to Los Angeles, restaurants pour on toppings, gravies and secret sauces.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Ali Khan devours an unbelievable dark truffle cake; Johnny Weir and Tara Lipinski indulge in an explosion of different chocolates in one luscious dessert; Scott Conant travels to Sin City to bet on a delicious chocolate mashup.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis; Wolfgang Puck reveals where he gets his favourite crispy Asian dish.

title: 100 Day Dream Home
subTitle: A couple is ready to move out of his parent's home and start a new life with their baby -- right next door. Building on sentimental property is an exciting task for Brian and Mika, but first they'll have to clear a lot filled with collectibles.

title: Hawaii Life
subTitle: A free-spirited nurse from San Francisco is ready to make Maui her new home; she has enlisted her sister to help her find a house that is close to the beach and offers outdoor space for entertaining.

title: Mountain Life
subTitle: Cory and Kathryn have been living the daily city grind for years, and are now they're ready to swap their concrete jungle for the mountain wilderness of resort town Sun Valley, Idaho.

title: India Decides : The Election Story
subTitle: India Decides : The Election Story

title: Say Yes to the Dress UK
subTitle: Debbie's twins prove hard to please when searching for the perfect dress; Kirstie tries to convince her mum to blow the budget on the dress of her dreams.

title: Halloween Wars
subTitle: The kitchen is set and the judges are ready for the world's best pumpkin carvers and cake and sugar artists; the show's crew travels across the U.S. -- and even venture out of the country -- to find the artists who have what it takes to compete.

title: Design Down Under
subTitle: A nurse with a busy lifestyle wants more function in her early 1900s home and calls Georgia and Richie in to help; as they begin to transform the cottage into the house of her dreams, she rethinks her wish list, creating strains on her budget.

title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
subTitle: Jilly is riding to her wedding on a tractor, so her dress must be practical and elegant. Plus, indecisive Faye fears she will make the wrong choice again.

title: You, Me & My Ex
subTitle: Elodie has ex-rated questions about De'Andre and Rowan's relationship; Loren needs to share a game-changing secret with April; Chantel's cohabitating concerns are proving to be true; Alex explodes at his dad-chelor party.

title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way
subTitle: Distraught Jenny no longer feels at home in India. Corey has a huge question to ask Evelin and Deavan and Jihoon have a traditional Korean wedding ceremony. Tiffany worries about Ronald's recovery when she and Daniel leave.
